prompt: High contrast black and white image of a tall window in a bare room, bright white light pouring in from outside. Deep pure black shadows on walls and floor. A single empty chair silhouetted against the window light. Extreme headroom — the ceiling takes up the top third of the frame, the chair sits low. Architectural lines prominent. Stark, elegant, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
